your azazie moment

About Us

At AZAZIE, we believe that everyone deserves to have the dress of their dreams regardless of their size or budget. We’re committed to body-positive fashion, representing all bodies in an industry that often does not. AZAZIE dresses are made-to-order, with fabric cut and hand-sewn upon order placement, allowing us to reduce waste and lower our environmental impact with no added cost to you. Now that you've found "the one", it's time to start planning and making major decisions, but you don't have to do it alone. Here at Azazie, we get inspired by love, and new brides every day.

WEDDING DRESSES, BRIDESMAID DRESSES AND SPECIAL OCCASION DRESSES FOR YOUR ENTIRE BRIDAL PARTY & FORMAL EVENTS

Now that you've found "the one", it's time to start planning and making major decisions, but you don't have to do it alone. Here at Azazie, we get inspired by love, and new brides every day. We are in the wedding business for a reason. Whether your style is modern or classic, elegant or bohemian, we have stunning wedding dresses for you at equally amazing prices. Our team is ready to help you discover the wedding dress of your dreams.

Still looking for inspiration? Explore our special bridal page for ideas, and don’t forget to check out our Atelier page for exquisite dresses for any occasion.

Bridesmaid Dresses

The most special ladies in your life deserve a gorgeous dress with the perfect fit that complements your style. With hundreds of colors and silhouettes to choose from, you’ll find a dress that not only fits your theme, but also suits their budget and ensures they look their best.

Wedding Dresses

Azazie has hundreds of gorgeous wedding dresses for you to choose from! Explore silhouettes, fabrics, and colors that match your vision. Whether your wedding is an elegant black-tie affair, a relaxed gathering, or an intimate destination ceremony, we offer gowns that capture your individual style.

Mother of the Bride or Groom Dresses

Make your wedding day an unforgettable experience for your mother and mother-in-law. With our captivating range of dresses, we ensure the mother of the bride and groom looks her absolute finest, contributing to the cherished moments of this significant occasion.

Junior Bridesmaid Dresses

Seeking adorable dresses for your junior bridesmaids? Immerse yourself in our vibrant collection of junior bridesmaid gowns, where affordability meets fabric finesse. Can't settle on the perfect shade? Embrace lively choices like blushing pink or dusty blue. Dreaming of a spring-themed wonderland wedding? Elevate the magic with lilac or sage green junior bridesmaid dresses that encapsulate the season's essence. Our junior bridesmaid dresses aren't just for the little ones – they're a fashion canvas for trendsetting teens adding their touch to weddings of beloved family members or besties.

Flower Girl Dresses

Check out a wide selection of flower girl dresses for wedding at Azazie. We offer girls flower dresses in white, ivory, champagne and a variety of other colors, to help celebrate your special day. When you buy from Azazie, rest assured that your flower girls will look the best for the ceremony, as every piece of our toddler flower girl dresses is made of quality fabrics and exquisite details.

Dresses

Shop Azazie's full collection of dresses for every style, season, and occasion. Make a bold statement in a sleek black dress, or turn heads in a vibrant red dress that commands the room. Prefer something floor-skimming and elegant? Our maxi dresses offer timeless sophistication, while our midi dresses strike the perfect balance between classic and contemporary. For a flirty, fashion-forward look, explore our mini dresses — ideal for parties, date nights, and everything in between. Whatever the moment calls for, Azazie has the dress for you.

Wedding Guest Dresses

At Azazie, we've curated a collection of wedding guest dresses that allow you to shine while celebrating the moment. Explore our array of elegant floor-length gowns or indulge in the allure of mini and maxi dresses, perfect for both intimate gatherings and casual festivities. From winter to summer, Azazie has you covered with the perfect wedding guest dress.

Dive into our popular shades, including emerald green, dusty pink, burgundy, plum, starlight light grey, and dusty blue. With an array of styles and silhouettes to choose from, you'll discover your ideal match. Azazie offers a diverse range of wedding guest dresses crafted for various occasions, all at unmatched prices. Elevate your guest style by shopping with us today!

Formal Dresses

Whether it's prom night or a corporate gala, our expansive collection of formal dresses ensures you'll captivate the spotlight at your important event. Your aura will shine brightly in Azazie attire, no matter your personal style.

Party Dresses

Azazie's party dresses are designed for every occasion. Whether it's a Christmas party, tea party, costume party, graduation party or homecoming, we have the perfect choice. From sparkling sequin mini dresses, sexy bodycon styles, elegant strapless designs and sweet bow embellishments, there's something for everyone. Keep browsing and get ready for the party.

Cocktail Dresses

We've cracked the code for cocktail and party dresses that steal the spotlight at black-tie affairs. Indulge in our sophisticated yet delightfully playful collection of unforgettable evening ensembles. Our latest lineup of cocktail dresses is a journey from flirty minis to elegant maxis, covering the spectrum from charming to captivating, and from classy to chic.

Holiday Dresses

Celebrate the season in style with Azazie’s holiday dresses, perfect for Christmas parties, New Year’s Eve celebrations, family gatherings, or office holiday events. With options ranging from glittering sequins to soft velvet and chic cocktail silhouettes, Azazie helps you shine with elegance and confidence at every festive occasion.

Men's Wedding Suits

Our men’s wedding suits are designed to keep groomsmen looking sharp and comfortable. With a range of classic and contemporary colors, you’ll find the perfect suit to match any wedding style and support the groom’s look with confidence.

Accessories

We have assembled a variety of accessories to complete your wedding day or formal look. You can find everything you need for your big day: shoes & bags, wedding veils, bridal, bridesmaid and groomsmen accessories.
